reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio y las chicas súper amables, en temporada suele haber mucha cola y el servicio se demora un poco

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and the girls are super friendly, although during peak season there's usually a long queue and the service can be a little slow.

reviews.comment:
Para ser ACA le falta un montón.

La estación de servicio está sin muchos cuidados.
La atención de la playera 10 puntos, pero la imagen del lugar podría mejorar muchísimo más.

(Translated by Google)
It's far from being an ACA (Argentine Automobile Club) station.

The gas station is poorly maintained. The attendant's service was excellent, but the overall appearance of the place could be much better.

reviews.comment:
Cargamos combustible y recibimos la atención del playero Pablo Arias muy buena predisposición y atención de su parte
Parada obligatoria a partir de ahora !

We filled up with fuel and received excellent service from the attendant, Pablo Arias. He was very helpful and attentive. A must-stop from now on!
